name: superteam
description: V4.7 main-session-as-orchestrator with the PLAN Tier A close-out. V4.7.3 adds the remaining two trust-chain hooks: (A2) PreToolUse gate_stage_advance blocks current-run.json edits that bump current_stage past spawn-log/artifact preconditions (review needs executor+execution.md, verify needs reviewer+review.md, finish needs verifier+verification.md+verdict=PASS); (A3) PostToolUse validator_frontmatter checks specialist artifacts (review.md/verify.md/verification.md/polish.md/final.md/finish.md/retrospective.md/execution.md/test-plan.md) for agent_type+agent_id+task_slug frontmatter matching spawn-log.jsonl, auto-stamping when absent and logging gate-violations on forgery. Together with V4.7.0 (mode.json + main-session write gate + spawn-log) / V4.7.1 (corrupt-mode warning + bypass) / V4.7.2 (Stop-hook + MCP whitelists), Tier A is now complete: self-stop / stage-skip / artifact-forge are all hook-blocked.
